metadata.title: Test Tiers — Staging (fast PR) vs Prod (full nightly)

child-plan.critical-rules: - GitHub Actions CI is EXPLICITLY DISABLED (CLAUDE.md Rule #21). Do NOT create workflow files with automatic triggers. Test tiers are for LOCAL use only. - Do NOT modify existing test logic — only add markers and configuration. - The "staging" tier MUST complete in under 2 minutes locally. - The "prod" tier runs ALL tests (no test left behind).

task.name: Profile test durations
task.command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/ tests/unit/ --durations=50 -q 2>&1 | tail -60
task.description: Identify tests taking >5 seconds each. These get @pytest.mark.slow. Identify tests requiring external services (MLflow server, Docker). Integration tests already in tests/v2/integration/ get @pytest.mark.integration.

task.name: Mark slow unit tests
task.description:
Add @pytest.mark.slow to unit tests that take >5 seconds. Common slow tests: topology loss gradient checks, full model forward passes, Hydra config composition with 20+ configs, hypothesis property-based tests.
DO NOT change test logic. Only add the marker decorator.

task.name: Mark integration tests
task.description: All tests in tests/v2/integration/ should have @pytest.mark.integration. Use a conftest.py autouse fixture or pytestmark at module level.

task.name: Create staging pytest config
task.content-guidance: [pytest] testpaths = tests/unit tests/v2/unit addopts = -m "not slow and not integration and not e2e and not gpu" -x --tb=short -q # Target: complete in under 2 minutes

task.name: Create test tier scripts
task.content-guidance: #!/usr/bin/env bash # Staging tests: fast unit tests only (target: under 2 min) set -euo pipefail echo "=== Staging Tests (fast) ===" MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest -c pytest-staging.ini
#!/usr/bin/env bash # Prod tests: full suite including slow, integration, GPU tests set -euo pipefail echo "=== Prod Tests (full) ===" MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/ -x --tb=short

task.name: Use staging tier in PR check
task.description: Update scripts/pr_readiness_check.sh to run staging tier by default, with --full flag for prod tier.
task.changes: Replace the pytest command with: if [[ "${1:-}" == "--full" ]]; then echo "[3/4] Full test suite..." MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/ -x --tb=short -q else echo "[3/4] Staging tests (fast)..." MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest -c pytest-staging.ini fi

task.name: Write test tier meta-tests
task.tests: - test_staging_config_exists: pytest-staging.ini exists and is valid - test_staging_excludes_slow: Staging config has "not slow" in addopts - test_staging_excludes_integration: Staging config has "not integration" in addopts - test_staging_scripts_exist: run_staging_tests.sh and run_prod_tests.sh exist

task.name: Verify staging tier timing
task.acceptance: Staging tests complete in under 2 minutes.

task.name: Commit, push, PR
task.steps: 1. git add and git commit 2. git push -u origin feat/test-tiers 3. gh pr create --title "feat: staging vs prod test tiers (#304)" 4. gh issue close 304 --comment "Completed in PR #NNN."
